my admin¶

为了模仿django admin的功能，实现了table,fields模块。table用于显示信息，fields用于管理form表单。

例子¶

design the shceme of admin , should in admin.py

from core.model_render import model_dc
from core.tabel import ModelTable
from core.fields import ModelFields

class BasicInfoTable(ModelTable):
    model = BasicInfo
    filters=['name','age']
    include = ['name','age']
    sortable=['age']
    per_page=2
    search_fields=['age','name']


class BasicInfoFields(ModelFields):
    model=BasicInfo
    fields=['name','age','user']

model_dc['basicinfo'] ={'model':BasicInfo,'table':BasicInfoTable,'fields':BasicInfoFields}

rout in main views function:

from core.model_render import Render
def render(request,url):
    md_render=Render(request, url, table_temp='model.html', fields_temp='fields.html')
    return md_render.rout()

原理：¶

  1. rigist model in admin.py.

    Include name,table and fields.Of course Table and fields is optional.

model_dc['basicinfo'] ={'model':BasicInfo,'table':BasicInfoTable,'fields':BasicInfoFields}
  1. set rout patter in views.

    include set table template,fields template.these template is default. model_render.Render will rout automaticly to table render,fields Render and fields save.

前端¶

same as table and fields module。
